title: Wearable Component
description: Wearable items can be worn by a player in the head, chest, legs, feet, or off-hand slots.

protection.title: Protection
protection.description: How much protection the wearable item has. Default is set to 0

slot.title: Slot
slot.description: Determines where the item can be worn. If any non-hand slot is chosen, the max stack size is set to 1
